Video Player.description: The primary demo screen that exercises the YouTube video player plugin — load, playback, volume/mute, captions, playback rate and metadata — driven from VideoPlayerEvents on MainLayout.

glossary.VideoPlayer: The plugin instance placed on MainLayout that wraps the YouTube IFrame player.

Second Screen.description: A secondary layout (SecondLayout) whose SecondEvents wires a button that navigates back to MainLayout, exercising multi-layout navigation in the sample.
